text: The bone marrow suspension is centrifuged at 1600 rpm for 5 minutes at 4°C. After discarding the supernatant, 1 mL of ACK lysis buffer is added and incubated at room temperature for 3 minutes. The reaction is terminated by adding 5 mL PBS, followed by a second centrifugation, and the cells are resuspended in 1 mL PBS. All procedures are performed under sterile conditions.
